principle: commerce_order creation and payment settlement orchestration are owned by sdkwork-order; membership owns subscription/entitlement domain and fulfillment after order payment success
allowedDependencyDirection: order -> payment (in-process OwnerOrderPaymentStore, webhook ingest, confirm payment ports)
order -> membership (MembershipPurchaseFulfillmentPort or HTTP adapter at gateway assembly, after payment settlement)
membership -> order-app-sdk (client / service facade consumer only)
membership -> payment-app-sdk (optional cashier read/redirect consumer only; not payment execution)

forbiddenDependencies.reason: Payment is foundation executor; order orchestrates settlement
Payment must not call business fulfillment capabilities
Membership must not import order service crates; consume order via SDK at client boundary
Membership repository must not write commerce_order in production paths
Membership must not orchestrate payment execution; order owns orders.payments.create

forbiddenProductionPatterns: INSERT INTO commerce_payment_intent from membership repository
PSP webhook route on membership or payment gateway for membership checkout
payment HTTP callback into membership for subscription activation
canonicalMembershipPurchaseFlow: order checkout or membership-subject order create (subject=membership) on order app-api
membership reserve pending_activation subscription linked to orderId (membership app-api or order create port)
order -> membership fulfillment port -> pending_activation to active + entitlements
verification: rg 'INSERT INTO commerce_order' crates/sdkwork-membership-repository-sqlx must return no matches
rg 'sdkwork_order' crates/ Cargo.toml in sdkwork-membership must return no production crate dependencies
